children.name: Ptilonorhynchus
children.description: The satin bowerbird — a monotypic genus of medium-sized bowerbirds. Males are glossy blue-black, while females are greenish-brown. The species is famous for the male's construction of an elaborate avenue-shaped bower of twigs, decorated with blue objects — bottle caps, feathers, berries — to attract females.

children.name: Ptilonorhynchus violaceus
children.description: The classic bowerbird of eastern Australia. Males are glossy violet-blue, females greenish with scalloped underparts. The male builds a walled avenue of twigs, painting the interior with a mixture of saliva and berry juice, then decorates it with blue objects. Immature males are green like females and acquire full adult plumage at age seven.

children.name: Sericulus
children.description: Regent bowerbirds — medium-sized, brightly coloured bowerbirds with striking yellow-and-black plumage. Males build an avenue bower decorated with colourful objects. Found in the forests of eastern Australia and New Guinea.

children.name: Sericulus chrysocephalus
children.description: A stunning bowerbird of eastern Australian rainforests. Brilliant golden-yellow crown and nape contrasting with velvety black body. Builds an avenue bower decorated with yellow leaves, flowers, and berries. Classified as Vulnerable due to habitat loss.

children.name: Chlamydera
children.description: Large grey-brown bowerbirds of Australia and southern New Guinea. They construct the most elaborate avenue bowers of all, decorating them with both natural and human-made objects. Some species paint their bowers with green plant pulp.

children.name: Chlamydera maculata
children.description: Found in inland eastern Australia. Grey-brown with heavy dark spotting above and pink nape patch. Builds a large avenue bower decorated with white objects including bones, stones, and human items. The bower can be over a metre long.

children.name: Chlamydera nuchalis
children.description: The largest bowerbird, found across northern Australia. Sandy-brown with a pink nape patch. Builds an enormous two-walled avenue bower decorated with hundreds of objects, with a preference for white and green items.
